title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 301.090 - Registration fees — collection and deposit
text:
301.090.  Registration fees — collection and deposit. — All fees for the registration of motor vehicles, trailers, certificates of title and motorcycles provided for herein shall be collected by the director of revenue and deposited with the state treasurer to the credit of the state highway department fund.
(RSMo 1939 § 8402, A.L. 1945 p. 1194, A.L. 1957 p. 623) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7784; 1919 § 7604 
Source and application of highway funds, Const. Art. IV § 30(b)
